name: Lasso Regression (L1 regularization)
applicable_scenarios: linear regression with automatic feature selection
sparse coefficient recovery when many predictors are irrelevant
python_template:
import numpy as np
from sklearn.linear_model import Lasso

def lasso_fit(X: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, alpha: float = 0.1) -> Lasso:
    model = Lasso(alpha=alpha, max_iter=10000)
    model.fit(X, y)
    return model
typical_cases: selecting a handful of biomarkers from thousands
variable selection in econometric panel data
common_pitfalls: with correlated predictors, Lasso arbitrarily picks one; consider ElasticNet
coordinate descent can be slow to converge without tuned max_iter
